sentences.en: Recent studies have demonstrated the significant impact of scope on the ecosystem.

sentences.blanked: Recent studies have demonstrated the significant impact of ________ on the ecosystem.

sentences.en: Researchers must carefully monitor the changes in scope during the experiment.
sentences.tr: Araştırmacılar, deney sırasında kapsam, faaliyet alanı durumundaki değişimleri dikkatle gözlemlemelidir.
sentences.blanked: Researchers must carefully monitor the changes in ________ during the experiment.

sentences.en: A key factor in achieving sustainable development is controlling the level of scope.

sentences.en: The primary objective of this project is to analyze the behavior of scope under pressure.
